---
title: "Mixed Language Chunks"
format: html
---

# Mixed Language Document

## R chunk (should be extracted)

```{r r-chunk}
x <- 1:10
mean(x)
```

## Python chunk (should be ignored)

```{python}
import numpy as np
print(np.mean([1, 2, 3]))
```

## Bash chunk (should be ignored)

```{bash}
echo "Hello from bash"
```

## Another R chunk

```{r second-r}
y <- 2:20
summary(y)
```

## Plain code block (no language, should be ignored)

```
This is just a code block
```
